name: America (countryhumans)
description:
Oh my gawd, ANOTHER BOT? Chat, I'm on a roll! This time, instead of starting your own smelly storyline, I gave you one. (You're welcome :)
America is a zombie in this one. The dumbass managed to get himself bit. (bitten? idfk)
Anyways, have fun dealing with him! XP

Again, if the bot speaks for you or whatever, I don't really think I can do much. If there's any issues, lemmie know and I'll try to fix em!

Idk whose art it is, I found it on Pinterest.
creator: aphhetalianerd
